calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-28-2022 Off Calendar

Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgement
Off Calendar Mar-23-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Daniel A. Solitro, Esq., LOCKE LORD LLP, (213) 485-1500 dsolitro@lockelord.com, for Defendant B & K INDUSTRIES, INC. and LOWE'S HOME CENTERS, LLC.
No other appearances.

Motion is not contested. Counsel for defendant appears to ensure that the submitted proposed order will is signed.

No hearing is held. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF GABRIEL ESPINOZA'S unopposed Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [proposed] consent judgment" is granted.

Order and Consent Judgment are signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com mailto:maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)
